hero.title: Where amazing customer experiences are built
hero.description: The gaqno platform combines CRM, Omnichannel, AI and your business data in integrated applications to operate and sell with intelligence.

products.title: Platform applications
products.description: Ready-made modules for management, sales, support and automation. Choose what fits your business.

crm.description: Centralize leads, opportunities and customer history. Visual pipelines, activities and integrated sales reports.
usageExamples: Create lead and move through pipeline

testimonials.quote: The visual pipeline helped us close more deals in less time.
testimonials.author: Sales team

erp.description: Inventory, purchasing and operations in one place. Control of inbound and outbound flow, suppliers and operations.

testimonials.quote: Inventory integrated with purchasing reduced stockouts and overstock.
testimonials.author: Operations

ia.description: Chat, text generation and automation with language models. APIs ready to integrate AI into your product.
usageExamples: Send prompt and get streaming response
Generate text or summaries via API

testimonials.quote: We integrated the chat API into our product in a few days.
testimonials.author: Product

rpg.description: Narrative and games with AI: adventures, characters and interactive experiences. Ideal for storytelling and gamification.
usageExamples: Create adventure and play with AI narrator

testimonials.quote: Sessions with the AI narrator are immersive and fun.
testimonials.author: Game masters

finance.description: Financial control with categories, entries and cash flow. Reports and consolidated view of the business.
usageExamples: Record income and expense by category

testimonials.quote: Cash flow view helps us make decisions with confidence.
testimonials.author: Controlling

pdv.description: Point of sale for stores: quick sales, integrated inventory and daily cash operations.
usageExamples: Register sale with items and payment method
Open and close register per shift

testimonials.quote: Faster sales and inventory always up to date.
testimonials.author: Store owner

omnichannel.description: WhatsApp, unified channels, queues and AI-powered support. One inbox for all channels.
usageExamples: Handle WhatsApp conversations from the queue
Assign conversation to team or agent

testimonials.quote: We unified WhatsApp and email in one inbox. Support is much faster.
testimonials.author: Customer support

saas.description: Cost management, tenants and platform plans. View of usage and billing per customer.

social_proof.title: Companies already running on the platform

cta_final.title: TL;DR: Don't wait for the future. Build it.
cta_final.description: gaqno offers the tools to connect digital experiences across any channel, access to your business data, and AI for efficient work. All in one platform with flexible pay-as-you-go pricing.

about.title: Who I am

background.title: My journey
background.content: With over 5 years of experience, I transform ideas into functional and elegant digital products. I work with international teams, leading projects from conception to delivery, always prioritizing quality, performance, and user experience.

items.description: Rede ANCORA has over 20 years of experience in the auto parts market and is currently known as one of the only distribution networks for franchisees in Brazil, also being one of the largest distributors in the country, with partnerships among the world's largest auto parts replacement manufacturers.

Creation of back-office modules using these implemented technologies

Work on portal migration to a new version
Use of modern technologies such as AWS, TailwindCSS, Vue, Nuxt 3, TypeScript and Node

items.description: Startup that develops an application to help brokers close sales and capture leads.
responsibilities: Development of new tools and fixes in CRM and backoffice

items.description: Dashboard for mission management developed in Angular.
responsibilities: Creation of pages consuming backend APIs
Development of interfaces for mission management

channels.title: All channels, one platform

features.title: Everything you need to delight customers at scale
features.subtitle: Powerful features for omnichannel sales, support and marketing.

items.title: Generative AI Chatbots
items.description: Build smart bots that respond in natural language, use documents as a knowledge base and hand off to humans when needed.

items.title: Bulk Messaging
items.description: Send segmented campaigns to thousands of contacts via WhatsApp, SMS or email with delivery and open tracking.

items.title: Unified Inbox
items.description: All channels in one dashboard. Your agents handle WhatsApp, email and chat without switching screens.

items.title: Reports & Dashboards
items.description: Track SLA, response time, resolution rate and agent performance in real time.

items.title: Automations & Rules
items.description: Set up automatic triggers for re-engagement, follow-up, triage and ticket routing.

items.title: Team Management
items.description: Organize agents into teams, set skill-based queues and monitor individual and collective productivity.

how_it_works.title: From zero to omnichannel in 3 steps

steps.title: Connect your channels

steps.description: Build AI chatbots, triage rules and service flows using our drag-and-drop visual editor.

steps.title: Engage and convert
steps.description: Send campaigns, attend in real time and analyze metrics to continuously scale your operation.

testimonials.title: Those who use it, love it

items.quote: We used to lose customers due to slow response times. With Gaqno Omnichannel, we unified WhatsApp and email and cut response time by 70%.
items.author: Marina Oliveira

items.quote: The AI chatbots handle 80% of inquiries on their own. Our team now focuses on conversations that truly need a human touch.
items.author: Carlos Mendes

items.quote: WhatsApp bulk messages have a 5x higher open rate than email. Our campaign ROI has skyrocketed.
items.author: Patricia Sousa

channels.title: Gaqno has everything you need to sell on the main sales channels in the market:

items.title: Marketplaces
items.description: With Gaqno you connect your sales to 100+ marketplaces, manage everything in one place and turn opportunities into revenue.

items.description: Connect your store to the Gaqno ERP System easily, track your orders in real time and have everything integrated — from order to delivery.

items.title: Physical store
items.description: Count on a complete POS solution that integrates your sales, inventory and finances in a simple and efficient way.

ecosystem.title: Much more than a CRM: an ecosystem for your growth
ecosystem.description: Expand your sales with Gaqno and join over 45,000 retailers who sell more.

items.description: Automate processes, integrate all areas of your business and experience a more centralized, agile and efficient operation.

items.title: Digital Account
items.description: Receive payments with a link or card reader on your phone, automate taxes and have all the tools to sell and manage finances with ease.

items.description: Manage your orders on the biggest marketplaces in one place, simply and synchronized, without missing any detail.

items.title: POS System
items.description: Integrated point-of-sale system to manage every sale, automate inventory and generate real-time reports for both physical and online store orders.

testimonials.title: Stories from those who make it happen with Gaqno

items.quote: Our company's main pain was having more efficient processes. With the Gaqno ERP implementation we achieved that efficiency, with better organization of our workflow and everything integrated.
items.author: Felipe Bernardini

items.quote: Before Gaqno I had to control everything manually and wasted so much time. Today, I create a charge or receive a bill to pay with everything very practical. It's very different because everything is automated.
items.author: Flávio & Juliana Agapito

items.quote: In the past we didn't have this, everything was manual. For me it was insane. Today, we have much greater control of inventory, expiration, finances and all that part we didn't have tight, today the system helps us with that.
items.author: Alexandre Sarti & Fabiola Soares
